name: Veritasium
oneLine: Canadian-Australian science communicator running long-form physics and engineering investigations on YouTube.
bio: Derek Muller, who holds a PhD in physics education research, started Veritasium in 2011 with street-corner interviews probing scientific misconceptions. The channel has grown into long-form, often hour-long documentary-style videos on physics, engineering, and investigative science journalism. Muller also runs the side channels 2veritasium and Sciencium.
style: long-form documentary explainers with on-location reporting, archival footage, and interviews
notable: How One Company Secretly Poisoned the Planet (PFAS)
The Bizarre Behavior of Rotating Bodies
